UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, JEAN Y. AS TO DEFENDANT ALTENA, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, JEAN Y. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-18-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTENA, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 745 SUTTER #405 $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR $1650 TO INCLUDE ATTY FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
